.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update Apache License URL from http to https for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to follow standard convention (java.io before java.net).
Reformat string concatenation in DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to single line.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.before:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/"
        + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.after:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL =
        "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat constant string assignments to single line.
Reformat constant string assignments to single line.
Add space after 'if' keyword for consistent formatting.
Add space after 'if' keyword for consistent formatting.
Add space after 'if' keyword and reformat nested if block.
Reformat System.out.println call to single line.
Reformat anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better readability.
Remove trailing whitespace at end of file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Adopt Java 17 text blocks for multi-line string literals to improve readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to log statement to ensure log lines are not split by logback converters.
Import CRLFLogConverter class used in the logging statement.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles to ensure the log message always displays profile information.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Wrap single string argument in array syntax for @EnableJpaRepositories annotation.
Remove Zalando Problem modules from Jackson configuration as they are no longer required or compatible with the current stack.
Reorder method parameters to place the annotated ObjectProvider after the plain LiquibaseProperties bean.
Remove unused imports related to the old security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Unused imports cause compilation warnings or errors in strict build environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused fields related to the old security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Unused fields cause compilation warnings or errors in strict build environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove @Import annotation for SecurityProblemSupport as it is no longer used.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Import annotation is no longer needed and causes compilation errors if the imported class is not found or used.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor static resource location and path configuration to use a more granular and modern mapping strategy.
Remove unused import for MediaType which is no longer referenced in the class.
Remove unused import for UnsupportedEncodingException as the try-catch block handling it was removed.
Remove unused import for java.util.* as specific collections are no longer used or handled differently.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
if (server instanceof ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) {
            ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory servletWebServer = (ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) server;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify URL decoding by using StandardCharsets.UTF_8 directly, removing the try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException which is unnecessary for UTF-8.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security/Spring MVC CORS APIs.
Remove CORS registration for deprecated Swagger v2 endpoints (/v2/api-docs, /swagger-resources).
Add CORS registration for Swagger UI v3 endpoint (/swagger-ui/**).
